messages.content: Generate a receipt confirmation email for customer Alice regarding order number 1000 placed through our online store.

Dear Alice, thank you for your purchase. Order 1000 has been confirmed and is now being processed by our fulfillment team. Your total of $42.50 has been charged to your card on file, and your package will ship within five business days. You will receive tracking information by email once it leaves our warehouse.
